message:
docs: add explicit rider license statement to README

Document the project license explicitly in README so repository documentation matches Cargo metadata and LICENSE.

Added a short License section pointing to the MIT License with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider file.

files.patch:

 4. Promote benchmark + sidecar checks to mandatory CI gates.
 5. Publish and continuously burn down full legacy NumPy parity debt until zero.
